summary: Iteration 10: Fixed critical GSC config persistence bug. GSC configuration was not being returned in GET /api/clients/{id} response because ClientConfiguration Pydantic model was missing the 'gsc' field. Added GSCConfig model and included it in ClientConfiguration. Now GSC connected status properly shows in Generator 5-step wizard. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns token and role=admin
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials return 401
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id} - NOW RETURNS GSC CONFIG (fixed this iteration)
Backend: GET /api/gsc/status - Returns redirect_uri and configured=true
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate - Accepts gsc_context without error
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate - Accepts serp_context without error
Backend: POST /api/articles/simple-generate - Accepts both contexts together
Backend: POST /api/serp/analyze-full - Returns competitors with retry logic
Backend: GET /api/stats/overview - Returns dashboard statistics
Backend: GET /api/activity-logs - Returns activity log entries (34+ operations)
Backend: GET /api/clients - Returns clients with totale_articoli
Frontend: Login with admin@seoengine.it / admin123 works
Frontend: Dashboard unified - shows stats (1 client, 9 articles, 4 published) AND clients table
Frontend: GeneratorPage - 5 step wizard (Strategia, Analisi SERP, GSC, Prompt, Genera)
Frontend: GSC step NOW shows 'GSC' without 'N/C' when connected (fixed)
Frontend: GSC step auto-loads data and shows 'Connesso' badge with 9 keywords
Frontend: GSC step shows metrics (80 impressions, 47 avg position)
Frontend: Storico Articoli (Article History) collapsible at bottom - shows 9 articles
Frontend: Activity Log page shows 34 operations, 16 successes, 0 errors, 3 WP publications
Frontend: ConfigurationPage has 3 tabs: API Keys, Knowledge Base, Tono & Stile

bug_fixed.description: GSC configuration was not being returned in client API response, causing frontend to show 'GSC (N/C)' even when GSC was connected
bug_fixed.root_cause: ClientConfiguration Pydantic model in models.py was missing the 'gsc' field. When MongoDB returned the full client document including gsc config, Pydantic filtered it out because it wasn't defined in the model.
bug_fixed.fix: Added GSCConfig model class and included 'gsc: Optional[GSCConfig] = None' in ClientConfiguration model
bug_fixed.verification: GET /api/clients/{id} now returns configuration.gsc with site_url, connected, enabled, and tokens fields

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 fixed GSC persistence bug. The ClientConfiguration model now includes 'gsc' field so GET /api/clients/{id} returns GSC config. Test client has GSC connected with valid tokens (expiry 2026-02-28T14:54:51). Generator 5-step wizard properly shows GSC connected status and auto-loads GSC data when entering step 3. Configuration page has 3 tabs as expected.

gsc_persistence_fix.issue: GSC config was filtered out by Pydantic model
gsc_persistence_fix.verification: API now returns configuration.gsc with connected=true
